meta.title: Contact the Inkwell Journal editorial desk
meta.description: Write to the Inkwell Journal desk about the essays, the OlonJS collections demo, or anything in between. We answer within two working days.

data.label: Contact
data.title: Write to the desk
data.description: Questions, corrections, or curiosity about how the collections are wired — all welcome.

paragraphs.text: Email is the fastest route: hello@inkwell-journal.example. We read everything and answer within two working days, usually sooner.
The desk sits at Via dei Tipografi 12, 40126 Bologna — visits by appointment. If you are writing about a correction, include the post title and the paragraph you mean.

image.alt: Vintage typewriter with a blank sheet of paper on a desk

paragraphs.text: We publish outside voices a few times a year. Pitch us one paragraph: the single sentence your piece exists to deliver, and why you are the person to write it.
Every accepted piece becomes an entry in the posts collection with its own tags — your essay ships wired into the same relation graph you are reading now.
